session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 9014 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill with the specified arguments:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Fetch PR feedback and comments for PR 9014

Source: `src/erk/cli/script_output.py:44-49`

This code block copies ~6 lines from the source file and will go stale if the source changes.

Suggested fix: Replace with the source pointer format from `docs/learned/documentation/source-pointers.md` (HTML comment + prose reference):

```", "created_at": "2026-03-08T14:30:27Z" } ] }, { "id": "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5y3KsS", "path": "docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md", "line": 274, "is_outdated": false, "comments": [ { "author": "github-actions", "body": "**Audit PR Docs**: Verbatim source code copy detected.

Source: `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py:47-53`

```

[View workflow run](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22822900742)", "body": "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-08 07:30:50 PT

Found 3 violations across 1 file. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
❌ Verbatim code blocks — Found in docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md:247, :274
❌ Drift risk (local path) — Found in docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md:308
✅ Inaccurate claims — None found

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md:247`: Verbatim copy of `exit_with_error` from `src/erk/cli/script_output.py:44-49`
- `docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md:274`: Verbatim copy of `OneShotDispatchResult` from `src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py:47-53`
- `docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md:308`: Drift risk — user-local path `/Users/schrockn/code/githubs/googleworkspace/cli` inaccessible to agents

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md`: 3 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/index.md`: 0 violations (index update only)
- `docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md`: 0 violations (tripwire entries only)
- `docs/learned/tripwires-index.md`: 0 violations (count update only)

### Doc Verdict
| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md` | SIMPLIFY | 15% | 65% | 2 verbatim, 1 drift risk |

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-08 07:30:50 PT**: Found 3 violations in new doc agent-friendly-cli.md: 2 verbatim code blocks (exit_with_error, OneShotDispatchResult), 1 drift risk (user-local path to gws repo)

</details>",

3. **Thread 3** (PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5y3Kux) - Line 308 - Author: github-actions (bot) - File: docs/learned/cli/agent-friendly-cli.md - Issue: Drift risk - local path inaccessible to agents - Classification: Actionable (documentation fix) - Pre-existing: True (bot comment, file is NEW, generic code quality issue about local paths) - Complexity: Local (single location)
**Discussion Comments:** - Comment 1: Plan queued for implementation (informational) - Comment 2: Workflow started (informational) - Comment 3: Starting implementation (informational) - Comment 4: Audit PR Docs summary (informational)
